testcase.name: test_date_range_filter

failure.message: TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_improvements.py:49: in test_date_range_filter assert t >= from_dt, f"{t} before {from_dt}" ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes

testcase.name: test_revenue_with_date_range

failure.message: AssertionError: expected 14 daily buckets, got 30 assert 30 == 14 + where 30 = len([{'label': '15/04', 'orders': 0, 'revenue': 0}, {'label': '16/04', 'orders': 0, 'revenue': 0}, {'label': '17/04', 'orders': 0, 'revenue': 0}, {'label': '18/04', 'orders': 0, 'revenue': 0}, {'label': '19/04', 'orders': 0, 'revenue': 0}, {'label': '20/04', 'orders': 0, 'revenue': 0}, ...])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_improvements.py:148: in test_revenue_with_date_range assert len(d["data"]) == 14, f"expected 14 daily buckets, got {len(d['data'])}" E AssertionError: expected 14 daily buckets, got 30 E assert 30 == 14 E + where 30 = len([{'label': '15/04', 'orders': 0, 'revenue': 0}, {'label': '16/04', 'orders': 0, 'revenue': 0}, {'label': '17/04', 'orders': 0, 'revenue': 0}, {'label': '18/04', 'orders': 0, 'revenue': 0}, {'label': '19/04', 'orders': 0, 'revenue': 0}, {'label': '20/04', 'orders': 0, 'revenue': 0}, ...])
